text:
The2024 Olympic Gamesare being held in Paris over the next two-and-a-half weeks, with 329 medal events being contested over 16 days of competition at the Paris 2024 Olympics. The United States collected the most gold medals and overall medals at the 2020 Games and will be favourites to take their share again in France.

But after collecting 22 in Tokyo three years ago, Team GB will take their 327 athletes for a short trip across the Channel hoping to improve on their total, which saw them finish fourth in the medals standings.

Scroll down for the full Paris 2024 Olympics schedule for all 16 days of action in the French capital.

Please note: This schedule is subject to change. All times are in British Summer Time (BST). All information is correct as of July 23, 2024.

title: Olympics 2024 full schedule: Day-by-day times for Paris events | Other | Sport | Express.co.uk
author: Joe Krishnan
description: The 2024 Olympic Games get underway in Paris today as Team GB's athletes descend on the French capital. Stay up to date with every sport across all 16 days.
